name: Old-Fashioned Corn Dogs
recipeIngredient: Vegetable oil or shortening (for deep frying)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 to 3 inches of oil in a large saucepan or electric fryer over medium-high heat until it reaches 375°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, stir together the flour and cornmeal.
3. Add milk, egg, and vegetable oil; stir until smooth. Let batter set for 10 minutes.
4. Insert skewers into weiners (optional).
5. Dip weiners into the batter.
6. Carefully drop the corn dogs into the hot oil.
7. Fry until golden brown and floating on top of the oil.
8. Drain on paper towels.
9. Serve hot with mustard and ketchup, if desired.
